task_completion.description: Create a forensic case with the specified name and number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A forensic GUI tool (e.g., Autopsy) is open, showing the case name 'Photo_Provenance_2024' and case number 'INV-EXIF-006' in the title bar, case properties, or new case wizard.

task_completion.description: Add the correct disk image as a data source to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data source tree or list in the forensic tool shows '/home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd' successfully loaded.

task_completion.description: Analyze the disk image to extract EXIF metadata from both allocated and deleted/carved JPEG files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The forensic tool displays a list of image files (including deleted/carved ones) and their associated EXIF metadata (e.g., dates, GPS coordinates, camera models) in the results viewer.

task_completion.description: Create the photo provenance catalog file with the required formatting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the file '/home/ga/Reports/photo_provenance.txt' containing pipe-delimited text. There must be exactly one line per image file, indicating whether it is allocated or carved/deleted, and using the word 'NONE' for any unavailable metadata.

task_completion.description: Create the EXIF summary file with the required timeline and assessment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the file '/home/ga/Reports/exif_summary.txt' containing the exact labels 'DATE_RANGE: <start to end>' and 'ANTI_FORENSIC_ASSESSMENT:' followed by 1-2 sentences assessing metadata stripping.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI forensic tool (like Autopsy) to analyze the disk image rather than relying solely on terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a graphical forensic application's interface (menus, data source wizards, result viewers).

integrity.description: The agent genuinely created the catalog and summary files based on the forensic analysis, rather than copy-pasting a pre-made template or echoing hardcoded strings without inspecting the evidence.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen viewing the metadata in the forensic tool and subsequently writing or exporting that specific data into the text files.

integrity.description: The agent did not access, read, or modify the hidden evaluation files.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal commands or file editor windows show interaction with '/tmp/exif_provenance_result.json' or '/tmp/exif_provenance_gt.json'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case Name: Photo_Provenance_2024. Case Number: INV-EXIF-006. Disk Image: /home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd.
